calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Continued To Feb-03-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds. APPEARANCES: Plaintiff by counsel, David Foran, Esq.; no appearance by or for defendant. DAVID KIMMEL sworn and examined in plaintiff's behalf. Exhibits admitted in evidence and withdrawn by counsel. The court awards judgment for plaintiff, against defendant. Judgment signed and filed this date.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. David Faran, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Albert Joshua and there being no appearance by Defendant, Debra Turner, the matter is taken off the settlement conference calendar, request for jury trial stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
